sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Implied Volatility Spikes for Brandywine Realty Trust Options
feed.summary: Implied volatility for Brandywine Realty Trust (BDN) options has significantly increased, particularly for the April 17, 2026 $8.00 Call option, suggesting market expectations of substantial price movements. Despite this, analysts are bearish on the company, evidenced by a Zacks Rank #4 (Sell) and lowered earnings estimates. This divergence creates potential trading opportunities for experienced options traders who might look to sell premium.

feed.title: Here's An Active Approach For Today's Financial Landscape
feed.summary: An active approach to investing in the financial sector can be beneficial, especially given the structural, regulatory, and macroeconomic shifts occurring today. Unlike traditional index funds that often focus on large, traditional banks, actively managed ETFs like the Baron Financials ETF (BCFN) can offer a more diversified portfolio. This strategy allows investors to capitalize on digital innovations and global financial trends by including fintech companies and businesses utilizing proprietary data, alongside select traditional financial powerhouses.

feed.title: China Curbs And Asset Sale Talks Recast BHP’s Commodity Exposure
feed.summary: BHP's commodity exposure is being reshaped by widened Chinese restrictions on its iron ore and advanced talks to sell its West Musgrave copper nickel project. The Chinese ban on Newman fines shipments intensifies contract talks for BHP's core iron ore business, while the potential sale of West Musgrave could free up capital and allow BHP to focus on long-life, low-cost assets, especially copper. These developments indicate a shift in where BHP earns its money and its reliance on customers, impacting how investors perceive the company's future risk and resilience.

feed.title: EOG Resources (EOG) Price Target Raised by Piper Sandler | EOG S
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has reiterated its "Neutral" rating on EOG Resources (EOG) and increased the price target from $127.00 to $144.00, marking a 13.39% rise. This adjustment follows several other recent analyst updates for EOG Resources, an oil and gas producer with significant operations in the Permian Basin and Eagle Ford. Analysts currently project an average target price of $134.85 for EOG, while GuruFocus estimates its fair value at $130.19.

feed.title: Is Hubbell (HUBB) Pricing Look Stretched After Strong Multi Year Share Gains?
feed.summary: Hubbell (HUBB) has seen strong multi-year gains but a recent pullback raises questions about its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued by 38.4% at its current price of $477.97, indicating a premium above the cash flow model's intrinsic value of $345.23 per share. However, its P/E ratio of 28.69x, which is below the industry average and slightly below Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 29.70x, suggests it may be undervalued on an earnings basis.

feed.title: Hasbro’s New Debt Deal To Fund Digital IP Might Change The Case For Investing In Hasbro (HAS)
feed.summary: Hasbro recently issued $399.4 million in senior unsecured notes to refinance older debt and pivot towards a digital-first, IP-focused business model. This move aims to leverage high-margin gaming and entertainment assets like Magic: The Gathering. While improving financial flexibility and supporting its digital strategy, the company still faces execution risks and overreliance on a few key franchises, according to the analysis.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reconsider ONEOK (OKE) After Recent Midstream Valuation Debate?
feed.summary: This article analyzes ONEOK (OKE) at its current share price of US$85.76, focusing on its valuation through a discounted cash flow (DCF) analysis and price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio. The DCF model suggests ONEOK is undervalued by 48.4%, with an intrinsic value of about $166.20 per share. Additionally, while its P/E of 15.9x is slightly above the industry average, Simply Wall St's "Fair Ratio" of 22.6x indicates the stock is undervalued on this metric considering its specific traits. The article also presents "Narratives" for bullish and bearish perspectives, allowing investors to consider different future growth and risk scenarios.

feed.title: Disney hands global communications reins to 25-year insider
feed.summary: The Walt Disney Company has appointed Paul Roeder as its new Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Communications Officer, effective March 19. A 25-year Disney veteran, Roeder will lead the company's worldwide communications and public relations strategy, reporting directly to incoming CEO Josh D’Amaro. He previously oversaw communications for Disney Entertainment Studios, Direct-to-Consumer, and International, playing a key role in major acquisitions and film releases.

feed.title: Incoming Disney CEO Josh D’Amaro Picks Company Vet Paul Roeder To Lead Corp Comms
feed.summary: Incoming Disney CEO Josh D’Amaro has promoted 25-year company veteran Paul Roeder to Senior EVP and Chief Communications Officer. Roeder will lead Disney's global communications and public relations, serving as the company's lead spokesperson, with his promotion effective March 19. He has played a pivotal role in major Disney acquisitions and launches, including the integration of 21st Century Fox and the launch of Disney+.

feed.title: C.H. Robinson’s 100 Trillion Data Points Reframe Its AI Advantage
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide has disclosed that its proprietary logistics dataset now feeds over 100 trillion real-world data points into its Lean AI system, coordinating millions of shipping decisions. This expanded AI platform is delivering measurable benefits to customers, like faster time to market and improved pickup performance, at a time when the company's stock has seen significant gains. The transparency regarding the scale of data and real-world outcomes serves as a crucial reference point for investors evaluating the company's AI advantage compared to other players in the logistics and freight industry.

feed.title: 10 Information Technology Stocks Whale Activity In Today's Session
feed.summary: This article identifies significant "whale activity" in the options market for ten Information Technology stocks, indicating potential trading opportunities. It details specific large-volume options contracts (sweeps and trades) for companies like Microsoft, GitLab, GLOBALFOUNDRIES, Ondas, TE Connectivity, SentinelOne, Micron Technology, Advanced Micro Devices, STMicroelectronics, and Marvell Technology. The report provides key data points for each transaction, including strike price, expiration date, sentiment (bullish, bearish, neutral), and total trade price, advising traders to note when market estimations diverge from normal option values.

feed.title: ISRG's da Vinci Gains FDA Nod for Cardiac Surgery: TAM Growth Ahead?
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) has received FDA clearance for several cardiac procedures using its da Vinci 5 system with non-Force Feedback instruments, signaling its intent to expand into cardiac surgery. While the immediate opportunity is estimated at 160,000 procedures annually in cleared markets, the company plans a cautious, multi-year rollout involving extensive training and development of cardiac-specific instrumentation. This expansion could significantly increase ISRG's total addressable market in the long term, though it's not expected to be a near-term revenue driver.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Corporation (LMT) To Provide Anti-Jamming Payload For Japan’s Next-Generation Defense Satellite Communication System
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (LMT) announced it will provide an anti-jamming payload to Mitsubishi Electric for Japan’s Next-Generation Defense Satellite Communication System, enhancing the satellite's resistance to interference and interoperability with allied nations. This payload will be manufactured in Colorado, with final assembly and testing in Japan. Lockheed Martin's shares have risen 34% year-to-date, though Wall Street maintains a cautious outlook. The company also announced Mark Kvasnak as its new Vice President of Investor Relations.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (LHX) Announces Appointment of Ken Sharp as SVP and CFO
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE:LHX) has appointed Ken Sharp as its Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, effective March 16. Sharp brings over three decades of experience in defense and technology, succeeding Ken Bedingfield who will now lead the company's Missile Solutions business and its potential IPO. The announcement follows a recent meeting between top defense contractors and a former US President, which led to a boost in L3Harris's stock, reflecting strong investor confidence.

feed.title: General Dynamics Corporation (GD) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $1.59 Per Share
feed.summary: General Dynamics Corporation (NYSE:GD) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.59 per share, an increase from the previous dividend, making it a dividend aristocrat. The payment is scheduled for May 8, 2026, to stockholders of record as of April 10, 2026. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for GD, with recent price target adjustments from BofA and Jefferies following the company's Q4 results.

feed.title: IBM Teams Up With E.SUN Bank on AI Governance: Will it Fuel Revenue?
feed.summary: IBM has partnered with E.SUN Bank to establish Taiwan's first enterprise-level AI governance framework for the banking sector, aiming for responsible, scalable, and compliant AI use. The collaboration resulted in a comprehensive framework and white paper providing tools and methodologies for large-scale AI deployments. This initiative strengthens IBM's position in responsible AI, competing with companies like Microsoft and Oracle in the financial AI market.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Raises Chevron (CVX) Price Target to $242 | CVX St
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has increased its price target for Chevron (CVX) to $242 from $179, maintaining an Overweight rating. This reflects a 35.20% increase in the target price and analyst Ryan Todd's positive outlook. The article also details recent analyst activities for Chevron and provides current Wall Street and GuruFocus forecasts, with an average target price of $186.75 from 23 analysts.

feed.title: Alchelyst Limited completed the acquistion of Lyra Client Solutions US, LLC from Motive Capital Management, LLC and Apollo Global Management, Inc..
feed.summary: Alchelyst Limited has successfully completed the acquisition of Lyra Client Solutions US, LLC from Motive Capital Management, LLC and Apollo Global Management, Inc. on March 12, 2026. This transaction follows an agreement made on August 14, 2025, and the combined entity will operate under the Alchelyst name, led by Alchelyst's founder and CEO, Joan Kehoe. Legal advisors for the deal included Paul, Weiss, Rifkind, Wharton & Garrison LLP, Kirkland & Ellis LLP, and McCann FitzGerald LLP.

feed.title: What Is Going On With Apple Stock On Thursday?
feed.summary: Apple Inc. shares declined on Thursday as investors moved away from mega-cap technology stocks due to escalating Middle East tensions and concerns about market concentration. The geopolitical risks, which led to a fall in the Nasdaq Composite and S&P 500, also fueled fears of inflation and economic instability, impacting Apple and other large tech companies. Amidst this, Apple is accelerating its supply chain diversification, significantly boosting iPhone production in India to reduce reliance on China.

feed.title: Is Bristol Myers' Deep Pipeline the Key to Future Growth?
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) is relying on its robust and promising pipeline to drive future growth, especially as its legacy drugs face generic competition. The company has several key pipeline candidates with multi-billion-dollar potential, including milvexian, admilparant, pumitamig, iberdomide, and mezigdomide, with significant registrational data expected in 2026. BMY is also pursuing label expansions for approved drugs like Sotyktu and Cobenfy.

feed.title: Charles River Labs Stock: Strong Performance vs. Underlying Business Challenges - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories' stock has significantly outperformed the S&P 500 over the past six months, driven by strong quarterly results. However, analysis reveals underlying business challenges, including declining organic revenue over two years and projected stalled growth below the sector average. The company also faces decreasing return on invested capital, suggesting a scarcity of profitable growth opportunities.

feed.title: More ‘Bluey’ Is Coming to Disney+
feed.summary: Disney+ is expanding its "Bluey" content with new additions in March and May 2026. This includes "Bluey’s Big Play – The Stage Show," a televised version of the popular touring production, and a collection of "Bluey Minisodes" previously available only online and in Australia. The global phenomenon "Bluey" was the top-streamed program in the U.S. for the second consecutive year in 2025.

feed.title: Dow, LyondellBasell upgraded at Citi as energy shock reshapes chemicals outlook (NYSE:DOW)
feed.summary: Citi upgraded Dow and LyondellBasell, among other U.S. chemical producers, citing the impact of rising geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and global energy flow disruptions. The analyst forecasts significant earnings increases for these companies due to stronger margins and increased spreads, as U.S. producers benefit from their stable, low-cost natural gas feedstocks compared to higher oil-based feedstock costs globally. However, risks remain tied to the duration of the conflicts.

feed.title: Stadion Money Management Takes $24.7 Million Position in PIMCO’s Actively Managed Bond ETF
feed.summary: Stadion Money Management, LLC has acquired 264,926 shares of the PIMCO Active Bond ETF (BOND), a position valued at $24.66 million as of December 31, 2025. This new stake represents 2% of Stadion's reportable assets under management. The PIMCO Active Bond ETF is an actively managed fund designed to provide institutional-style bond management by dynamically allocating across various fixed-income sectors based on market conditions, rather than tracking a fixed index.

feed.title: 12 Communication Services Stocks Moving In Thursday's Intraday Session
feed.summary: This article details significant movers in the communication services sector during Thursday's intraday trading session. It highlights both gainers, such as Bumble, Fangdd Network Group, and TechTarget, with reasons like Q4 earnings reports driving their increases. Conversely, it lists losers including LQR House, System1, and Knorex, with System1 also having reported Q4 earnings.

feed.title: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) Class Action Lawsuit: Investors Fac
feed.summary: A securities fraud class action lawsuit has been filed against PayPal Holdings, Inc. (PYPL) by Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP. The lawsuit alleges material misstatements regarding the company's revenue outlook and growth during the period of February 25, 2025, to February 2, 2026. Investors who purchased PayPal common stock during this period and suffered losses have until April 20, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status.

feed.title: Blackstone Stock Falls To 52-Week Low: Here's Why
feed.summary: Blackstone (BX) shares are down and hit a new 52-week low after Morgan Stanley restricted withdrawals from one of its private-credit funds, intensifying fears of contagion in the $2 trillion private-credit market. This follows Blackstone's own earlier surge in redemption requests for its BCRED fund. Concerns are also rising due to AI-related credit risks impacting software companies, a major borrower group in private credit, with JPMorgan already marking down some software-linked loans and tightening lending in the sector.

feed.title: Northern Trust Taps ICE ETF Hub to Enter U.S. ETF Servicing Market
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corporation is expanding into the U.S. ETF servicing market by partnering with Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. and utilizing ICE ETF Hub as its order-taking platform. This strategic move aims to capitalize on the growing demand for ETFs among institutional investors by streamlining ETF operations through technology integration. The collaboration intends to enhance Northern Trust's asset servicing business and support long-term revenue growth.

feed.title: AcadiaInsurance implements collaborative risk mitigation, W. R. Berkley Corporation asserts
feed.summary: W. R. Berkley Corporation is promoting a proactive risk management philosophy, emphasizing the significant role of AcadiaInsurance. AcadiaInsurance aims to help businesses prevent losses by identifying and mitigating risks beforehand, offering expert guidance and fostering collaboration with clients to strengthen their loss control frameworks. This strategy is designed to improve client resilience and reduce their exposure to potential operational disruptions.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) SVP Sells 7,364 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Williams Companies (NYSE:WMB) SVP Todd Rinke sold 7,364 shares of the company's stock, valued at over $547,000, reducing his stake by 22.04%. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.525 per share, and analysts rate WMB as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $75.86. Despite missing Q4 EPS consensus, the company reported solid revenue and issued FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings Inc (BJ) Shares Up 4.44% on Mar 12
feed.summary: BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings Inc (BJ) shares rose 4.44% to $97.66 on March 12, trading 19.36% below its 52-week high and 12.67% above its 52-week low. Analysts set an average price target of $105.30, suggesting a 7.82% upside, while GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $95.89, indicating a slight downside. The stock holds an "Outperform" status from brokerage firms.

feed.title: Bluejay Advances Symphony IL-6 Sepsis Diagnostic Program
feed.summary: Bluejay Diagnostics announced that its Symphony IL-6 Test abstract for sepsis diagnosis was accepted for presentation at the 2026 SAEM Annual Meeting. Data from the SYMON-I pilot study indicate that emergency department IL-6 levels may predict organ dysfunction in sepsis patients, supporting the test's potential as an early biomarker. The company's pivotal validation study, SYMON-II, is ongoing and aims to underpin a future 510(k) submission for FDA clearance.

feed.title: Bluejay Diagnostics: SYMON-I IL-6 Findings Accepted for SAEM 2026 Presentation
feed.summary: Bluejay Diagnostics announced that findings from its SYMON-I study, indicating a potential link between ED IL-6 levels and subsequent organ dysfunction in sepsis, have been accepted for presentation at the SAEM Annual Meeting in May 2026. The SYMON-I study is a multicenter pilot evaluating IL-6 levels and organ dysfunction via SOFA scores. The company also noted that a pivotal validation study, SYMON-II, is underway to support an FDA 510(k) submission.

feed.title: New Mexico's Ron Corio makes Forbes' annual World's Billionaires List
feed.summary: Former Array Technologies CEO Ron Corio has made Forbes' annual World's Billionaires List with an estimated worth of $2 billion, ranking 2,052nd. The article announces this achievement and mentions that the publication will highlight other individuals on the list with ties to New Mexico.

feed.title: Is Belden (BDC) Quietly Recasting Its OT Security Moat With New Virtual Firewall Launch?
feed.summary: Belden Inc. recently introduced a new Virtual Firewall for operational technology (OT) environments and LioN-X LC Digital I/O Modules, aiming to enhance scalable cybersecurity and network efficiency. This move expands Belden's role in converged OT security and industrial automation, aligning with its strategic shift towards higher-value, software-enabled solutions. While these innovations support the company's long-term growth narrative and its dividend commitment, investors should monitor potential near-term macro and spending risks that could affect adoption rates.

feed.title: TOUR Championship Delivers Community Impact with Record-Setting Contribution from 2025 Tournament
feed.summary: The TOUR Championship announced a record $7.3 million contribution from its 2025 event, marking an increase from the previous year, and bringing its total raised for local nonprofits to over $71 million since 1998. This contribution supports various community organizations in Metro Atlanta, including the East Lake Foundation, and was announced during Charles R. Drew Charter School's annual STEAM Day. The funds are a result of support from partners, fans, and the community, investing in programs that strengthen local lives.

feed.title: Banco Bilbao Viscaya Argentaria (NYSE:BBVA) Shares Gap Down - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Shares of Banco Bilbao Viscaya Argentaria (NYSE:BBVA) gapped down at market open on Thursday, trading at $20.60 after closing at $21.88. This early sell-off followed a mixed analyst sentiment, with two "Buy" ratings and three "Hold" ratings, resulting in a MarketBeat consensus of "Hold." Despite changes in analyst ratings and recent share price movement, the bank reported a solid quarter, matching EPS estimates and beating revenue expectations, while also declaring a dividend of $0.7084.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Todd Rinke Sells Shares of Williams Companies Inc (WMB)
feed.summary: Todd Rinke, Senior Vice President at Williams Companies Inc (WMB), sold 7,364 shares of the company on March 11, 2026, reducing his holdings to 26,055 shares. This sale is part of a trend over the past year with 16 insider sells and no buys. With a trading price of $74.39 and a GF Value of $50.80, the stock is considered significantly overvalued, and its price-earnings ratio of 34.87 is higher than both the industry and company historical medians.

feed.title: Trade Tracker: SLB, Petrobras and Canadian Natural Resources
feed.summary: Stephanie Link, CIO at Hightower, and Joe Terranova, Senior Managing Director for Virtus Investment Partners, discussed their latest portfolio transactions on CNBC's "Halftime Report." The segment, titled "Trade Tracker," focused on investment moves involving SLB, Petrobras, and Canadian Natural Resources. This discussion provides insights into how these financial professionals are adjusting their holdings.

feed.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Lucid, CF Industries, Royal Caribbean, Petco & more
feed.summary: This article details the biggest movers in midday trading, highlighting companies like Petco Health and Wellness and Bumble that saw significant gains due to positive outlooks and strong financial results. Conversely, Mercado Libre, Lucid Group, and various private credit stocks experienced declines influenced by analyst downgrades, delayed profitability projections, and withdrawal caps. The movement of these stocks reflects diverse factors including market competition, oil prices, and industry-specific news.

feed.title: Electronic warfare autonomy software demonstrated by L3Harris, Shield AI
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies and Shield AI have demonstrated an integration of L3Harris’ Distributed Spectrum Collaboration and Operations battle management ecosystem with Shield AI’s Hivemind mission-autonomy software for autonomous electronic warfare. The demonstration involved a hardware-in-the-loop simulation where threat data from uncrewed aerial systems was used to build a shared electromagnetic environment view, enabling a UAS with Hivemind software to perform mission-critical maneuvers. The companies plan for live-flight testing later in 2026 for coordinated electronic warfare operations.

feed.title: Deere, Caterpillar and 10 Other Stocks for an AI-Infused Blue Collar Renaissance
feed.summary: The article discusses how artificial intelligence is driving stock market trends, influencing both companies benefiting from AI data center spending and those facing challenges due to AI's impact. It focuses on how traditional industrial companies like Deere, Caterpillar, and Rockwell Automation can leverage AI to simplify operations, reducing the need for extensive training. This suggests an "AI-Infused Blue Collar Renaissance" led by technology.

feed.title: Dollar General Wraps Up Strong Q4 Amid Consumer Value Push
feed.summary: Dollar General reported strong Q4 FY2025 results with net sales of $10.9 billion, a 5.9% year-over-year increase, and same-store sales up 4.3%. The company's Value Valley program saw a 17.6% comp sales increase, and non-consumables performed well. Dollar General also achieved significant gross margin expansion due to shrink reduction efforts and plans to open 450 new stores and execute thousands of remodels in FY2026, targeting rural communities.

feed.title: Campbell Soup Company (CPB) Downgraded to Underweight: Analyst Cites Caution Amidst Volatility
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Chris Carey has downgraded Campbell Soup Company (CPB) to "Underweight" with a price target of $28, citing caution amidst market volatility. The stock has experienced significant declines over the past year despite recent earnings beats, making it potentially unsuitable for defensive investors due to its historical performance and investment grade of 38. Analysts show divergent views, with an average price target of $28.89, suggesting limited upside potential.

feed.title: Salesforce’s Record Bond Sale Recasts Buybacks Leverage And Credit Profile
feed.summary: Salesforce has launched a US$25 billion senior notes offering, its largest debt sale ever, to fund a US$50 billion share repurchase program. This move signifies a shift in capital allocation, increasing the company's leverage and leading to credit rating downgrades. Investors should monitor the impact of higher interest costs, the pace of share count reduction, and Salesforce's flexibility to continue funding new products and acquisitions.

feed.title: Archer-Daniels-Midland: We See Higher Near-Term Profits From Middle East War-Related Volatility
feed.summary: Morningstar has raised its fair value estimate for Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) to $60 from $55, citing expected higher near-term profits due to volatility from the Middle East war. Disrupted global trade and rising oil, corn, and soybean prices are anticipated to lead to greater profits for grain merchandisers like ADM in 2026 and 2027. Despite the upgraded valuation, ADM shares are currently considered overvalued, trading more than 15% above the new fair value estimate.

feed.title: Is Apple Stock's 29.63X PE Still Worth it? Buy, Sell, or Hold?
feed.summary: Apple (AAPL) stock is currently considered overvalued with a forward P/E of 29.63X, higher than its sector and peers. Despite strong performance driven by iPhone sales, new MacBook launches, and a robust Services segment, the company faces intense competition in the PC, smartphone, and AI markets. Analysts recommend a "Hold" rating due to its stretched valuation and competitive landscape.

feed.title: Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) Given New $67.00 Price Target at Piper Sandler
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has increased its price target for Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) from $59.00 to $67.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a potential upside of 45.67%. This new target is significantly higher than the consensus analyst target of $48.85, although the stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts. Devon Energy recently reported strong quarterly earnings of $0.82 per share, surpassing analyst estimates, despite a slight year-over-year revenue decrease.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Increases ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) Price Target to $154.00
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has raised its price target for ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) to $154.00 from $111.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 27.93% from the current share price. The move comes despite ConocoPhillips missing last quarter's earnings and revenue estimates, and significant insider selling over the past 90 days.

feed.title: Celanese (NYSE:CE) Price Target Raised to $81.00 at Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup has increased its price target for Celanese (NYSE:CE) from $75.00 to $81.00, maintaining a "buy" rating and suggesting a potential upside of 34.71%. This comes despite Celanese missing its recent quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. While analyst coverage remains mixed, other firms have also adjusted their price targets and ratings, with some recent upgrades along with earlier downgrades in response to earnings and market conditions.
